name: Arif Hossain
bio: Met during freshman year at RUET. Bonded over late-night study sessions and bad canteen food. Now works as a software engineer in Dhaka.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Best friend since class 8. We've been through every major life event together. She's now doing her masters at Dhaka University.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: Met in the programming club at university. We competed in hackathons together. He moved to Chittagong for a job at a fintech startup.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Connected on Twitter over a shared interest in UI/UX design. She's a product designer in Bangalore and has been incredibly helpful with portfolio advice.

name: Sabbir Rahman
bio: Lab partner in digital electronics and my go-to person for debugging circuits. We play cricket every Friday. One of the most reliable people I know.

name: Meherun Akter
bio: We were inseparable in secondary school but drifted after college admissions. Catch up a few times a year and it always feels like no time has passed.

name: Rahim Chowdhury
bio: Family friend who became a personal mentor. He's a senior engineer at a telecom company and always gives grounded career advice. Respect him deeply.

name: Lamia Sultana
bio: We formed a study group in second year and she became one of my closest friends. Incredibly sharp, especially in algorithms. Wants to do a PhD abroad.

name: Omar Faruk
bio: Met through a GitHub open-source project. We've collaborated on a React component library. Lives in Sylhet and is a self-taught full-stack developer.

name: Fatema Begum
bio: Grew up next door. We rode the same school bus for 10 years. She's studying medicine in Rajshahi Medical College and we still grab tea on weekends when possible.
